pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version from 8 to 11 to enable compilation of Java 11 features.

docker-compose.yaml.general_idea: Add Spring Security OAuth2 JWT issuer and JWK set URIs for Operate to enable proper identity integration.
Add Spring Security OAuth2 JWT issuer and JWK set URIs for Tasklist to enable proper identity integration.
Add a PostgreSQL service to provide persistent storage for Keycloak, replacing the default H2 database.
Switch Keycloak image from JBoss to Bitnami to support PostgreSQL backend and updated configuration structure.
Configure Keycloak to connect to the new PostgreSQL service for user data persistence.
Update Keycloak environment variables to match Bitnami image requirements (admin user/password naming).
